content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market constructive across the board with IT, Auto, Pharma, Energy all green and Nasdaq tailwind from US AI trade. Q4 earnings cluster digesting positively (PNBHOUSING, KOTAKBANK, BAJFINANCE, ADANIPORTS, CEAT, BANDHAN all beat). However VIX 18.46 elevated, FII outflows persistent through April, and crude near $108 plus Iran war overhang keeps macro risk live. Book is +0.86% intraday with multiple winners — focus is trailing SLs on movers, not chasing fresh entries pre-open.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.7% winner. Current SL 1032 is already above entry 984 (locks in +4.9%). CMP 1045.65, SL 1032 sits ~1.3% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Q4 was a beat (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, retail disbursement +32%). MACD bullish, price above all SMAs, breakout from 850 base. Holding SL/target unchanged — micro-adjust would be wasted signal. NOTE: this is effectively a HOLD; not changing stored values."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge against Iran war / crude / INR. CMP 123.43 vs entry 125.10, -1.3%. SL 119 (-3.4% room). Gold spiked +₹2000 on May 2 on fresh Middle East tensions. Hold as portfolio insurance — thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1788.00,
      "new_target": 1860.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.0% winner near 52w high (1849). Current SL 1788 already locks in +3.1% (above entry 1734). Trail-gap: 1788 vs CMP 1808 = 1.1% — tight but acceptable given low ATR. Raising target slightly to 1860 reflects momentum from Organon deal narrative + bullish broker upgrades to ₹2300. Keeping SL at 1788 (no further tightening, would breach 0.5% trail-gap rule)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.7%, near 52w high 485.70. CURRENT SL 478.50 vs CMP 481.45 — SL is only 0.6% below CMP, perilously tight and risks self-stopout on normal noise. LOOSENING IS NOT ALLOWED — but my SL is already too tight. Holding stored 478.50 unchanged. CORRECTION: cannot lower SL. Will leave SL at 478.50 and accept self-stopout risk; if stopped at 478.50 still books +2.0%. NO MODIFY emitted (would be a no-op or rejected lower)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "REVISED: SL 478.50 already at +2.0% lock-in but only 0.6% below CMP — violates trail-gap discipline. However SL can only be tightened, not loosened. Holding unchanged. April production -9.7% YoY is a yellow flag; if stopped at 478.50, exit is acceptable (+2%). Will not raise SL further."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "new_target": 210.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, broke above 200. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, hit 52w high 204.44 on 8.2x volume. Trailing SL from 195 → 198 (locks in -1% worst-case from entry 200 — near breakeven). 198 vs CMP 199.72 = 0.86% gap — within trail-gap rule. Target unchanged at 210. Sector banking remains weak but BANDHAN idiosyncratic on Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, SL 296 ~0.8% below CMP 299.55. Q4 results May 21 — binary event 13 sessions out, not in 3-session window. Senior management turnover (CFO + 3 EDs) is a yellow flag but crude $108 is a tailwind for upstream. Holding SL/target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, SL 23.55 vs CMP 23.91 = 1.5% gap — fine. ETF passive exposure to pharma basket. US tariff overhang persists but generics still exempt. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, SL 915 vs CMP 937 = 2.3% room. Q4 beat (PAT +22%), management FY27 guidance ROA 4.4-4.6%/ROE 19-20%, broker targets 1000-1100. Thesis intact, holding SL/target unchanged. Will trail when position moves into +2% territory."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Same-name re-entry cooldown still active (exited Day-3 Apr 24, today is Day 15 May 4 — 7 sessions, just out of cooldown technically). HOWEVER Q4 results May 26 = binary event in 16 sessions, not immediate. Bigger issue: CMP 1736 is +35% above SMA50, parabolic move, near 52w high 1824 — chasing a stretched chart after my own exit. Pre-commitment failure pattern flagged in rules. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KOTAKBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (PAT +13.4%, NNPA 0.25%) but stock is still well below SMA200 (410.60) and chart structure is range-bound 367-386 with no breakout. Already adding to a banking name (BANDHANBNK held). Sector cluster discipline — wait for clean break above 386 with volume."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +9.4%, dividend ₹7.50) and 100% Buy ratings, but Adani group SEBI inquiry overhang per Rule 13 (regulatory due diligence) — multiple pending cases. Default disposition with active regulator overhang on a NEW entry is NO_ACTION. Bullish operating numbers do not neutralize unresolved governance leg. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CEATLTD",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "11x volume + -4.96% selloff after Q4 beat is a classic post-results sell-the-news with margin guidance disappointing. Chart broke down through SMA20/50/200 in two sessions (Bearish Marubozus). Catching a falling knife, no clear reversal signal yet. Wait for stabilization."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today = binary catalyst within 0 sessions. Rule 11: do NOT open new CNC into a binary event in next 3 sessions. Stock has rallied +8% pre-results raising expectations bar. Pass; revisit post-print."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Index range-bound below 24,300 resistance with persistent FII outflows (₹70,100 cr in April). Already have broad equity exposure via single names. Adding NIFTYBEES adds correlation, not diversification. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locked at +4.9% above entry. Trail-gap of 1.3% is acceptable. Don't churn."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL 4.9% below entry is intentional wider stop on a defensive position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1788.00,
      "reasoning": "SL locks +3.1% gain. Cannot tighten further without breaching 0.5% trail-gap from CMP 1808."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.50,
      "reasoning": "SL too tight at 0.6% below CMP but cannot loosen. Accept stop-out risk; +2% lock-in if hit. Do not raise further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 195 → 198 to lock in near-breakeven on Q4-beat momentum. Gap to CMP 199.72 is 0.86%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 296.00,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.2%, SL has 0.8% room. Q4 May 21 (13 sessions out, not in 3-session binary window yet). Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.55,
      "reasoning": "ETF defensive exposure; SL has 1.5% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 915.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 2.3% below CMP. Will trail when position turns positive +2%."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TORNTPOWER cooldown technically expired but chart is parabolic and Q4 May 26; revisit post-results if pullback to SMA20 (~1537). KOTAKBANK watch for break above 386 on volume. EXIDEIND revisit post-results today — if clean beat with dividend, look for pullback entry. CEAT watch for stabilization after volume capitulation; Nomura PT 4276 vs CMP 3445 = 24% upside if base forms.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 42% — well below 80% soft target with ₹587K cash. 8 positions, all CNC, day 0 holds. Today's job is letting the Q4-beat winners (PNBHOUSING +6.7%, SUNPHARMA +5%, COALINDIA +2.7%, BANDHANBNK +1.4%) breathe with appropriately trailed SLs. Not chasing pre-market breakouts — VIX 18.46 + FII outflows + crude $108 argue for selectivity. GESHIP pending order from prior session is stale (5966 min old — ~4 days); should be cancelled in a separate housekeeping decision since the original setup has likely moved away. Will address GESHIP via cancel in next decision cycle if engine supports it; for now flagging for review."
}
